title: viola × pacheri
intro: Viola × pacheri, also known as the viola hybrid, is a cross between two species of viola, specifically Viola sororia and Viola sororia var. pacherae. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Viola × pacheri include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Viola × pacheri often involve making a tea from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed hot or cold, or using it as a tincture in combination with other herbal remedies.
